steps: Go to https://pdfshift.io/ and click 'Sign Up' to create a free account
Log in and navigate to https://app.pdfshift.io/env/ (Account / Environment settings)
Your API key is displayed on this page (starts with sk_)
Copy the API key and use it in the X-API-Key request header

credential_fields.name: api_key
credential_fields.label: API Key
credential_fields.description: Your PDFShift API key (starts with sk_)

notes: Free tier includes 50 conversion credits per month — no credit card required
API key is displayed in the dashboard and can be regenerated if compromised
Use the header: X-API-Key: <your_key> for all requests
Paid plans start at ~$9/month for 500 conversions
Supports HTML-to-PDF, HTML-to-PNG, HTML-to-JPEG, and HTML-to-WebP conversions
Base URL for all API calls: https://api.pdfshift.io/v3

test_endpoint.description: List all saved HTML templates in your account
